title: HEALTH AND FITNESS - 211info
text: BOYS & GIRLS CLUB OF WESTERN LANE COUNTY SIUSLAW ELEMENTARY SCHOOL HEALTH AND FITNESS Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Focuses on improving the overall health of Club Members by increasing their daily physical activity through recreational activities and team sports, providing nutrition education, and helping them develop healthy relationships. 2221 Oak Street Florence, OR 97439 Eligibility: Grades K-4 Hours: After School Program: Monday-Friday 1:30pm-5:30pm Teacher In-Service Days and Summer Program: Monday-Friday 7:45am-5pm Email (541) 999-2872 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers (541) 999-2872 Main phone Main phone (541) 999-2872 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Walk in, call, or visit website for more information FEES: $25 per year base membership fee After-School program: $100 per month Summer program: Call for more information DOCUMENTS: None AREA SERVED: Cities of Florence and Mapleton SITE HOURS: After School Program: Monday-Friday 1:30pm-5:30pm Teacher In-Service Days: Monday-Friday 7:45am-5:30pm Summer Program: Monday-Friday 7:45am-5:30pm Services: General Recreational Activities/Sports Nutrition Education Team Sports/Leagues Other Services Offered At This Location: SOCIAL DEVELOPMENT AND ENRICHMENT - BOYS & GIRLS CLUB If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service.
